title: Laptop choice
scenario: A student needs a laptop for classes, homework, and working in cafes. Battery life and price matter most. Low weight also helps.
decision_prompt: Which laptop is the best overall choice for this user?

show.summary: The visual explanation shows that battery life and price are the strongest reasons for the recommendation.

tell.main_text: The AI recommends NovaBook Air because it offers strong battery life while keeping price and weight reasonable.
steps: Battery life is the most important factor for this user.
Price is the second most important factor.
Weight matters, but it is less important than battery life and price.

try.instructions: Change the importance of each factor and observe whether the simulated recommendation changes.

title: Headphones choice
scenario: A frequent traveler wants headphones for flights and long train rides. Noise cancellation and comfort matter more than price.
decision_prompt: Which headphones are the best overall choice for this user?

features.label: Noise cancellation
features.description: Higher noise cancellation score is better.

show.summary: The visual explanation shows that noise cancellation and comfort should carry more weight than price.

tell.main_text: The AI recommends QuietWave Lite because it is cheaper, but the user said travel comfort and noise cancellation matter more than price.
steps: Noise cancellation is the most important factor for travel.
Comfort is also very important for long trips.
Price matters, but it should not dominate this decision.

try.instructions: Change the feature importance values to see when the simulated recommendation favors comfort and noise cancellation over price.

title: Backpack choice
scenario: A student needs a backpack for a laptop, books, and rainy campus walks. Capacity and water resistance matter most. Low weight also helps.
decision_prompt: Which backpack is the best overall choice for this user?

show.summary: The visual explanation shows that capacity and water resistance are the main reasons for the recommendation.

tell.main_text: The AI recommends CampusShield because it has the best capacity and the strongest water resistance, while its weight is still acceptable.
steps: Capacity matters because the user carries a laptop and books.
Water resistance matters because the user walks in rain.
Weight matters less because all options are reasonably portable.

try.instructions: Change capacity, water resistance, and weight importance to explore whether the recommendation changes.

title: Meal kit choice
scenario: A busy person wants a meal kit that is healthy, reasonably quick to prepare, and not too expensive. Health matters most.
decision_prompt: Which meal kit is the best overall choice for this user?

show.summary: The visual explanation shows that health score should be the largest factor in this task.

tell.main_text: The AI recommends QuickLite Meals because it is faster, but the task says health matters most. FreshBalanced has the strongest health score.
steps: Health is the top priority for this user.
Preparation time is important but secondary.
Price matters, but it should not outweigh the health requirement.

try.instructions: Adjust the weights to see how much health importance is needed before the simulated recommendation changes.

title: Phone plan choice
scenario: An international student needs a phone plan with enough mobile data and many international minutes. Price matters, but communication needs are more important.
decision_prompt: Which phone plan is the best overall choice for this user?

show.summary: The visual explanation shows that data and international minutes are the strongest factors.

tell.main_text: The AI recommends GlobalConnect because it provides the most data and international minutes, which match the user's main needs.
steps: Mobile data is important for daily use.
International minutes are important for calling family or contacts abroad.
Price matters, but the cheaper plans do not meet the communication needs as well.

try.instructions: Change the importance of data, international minutes, and monthly price to see how the recommendation changes.

title: Monitor choice
scenario: A computer science student needs a monitor for coding and schoolwork. Screen space and resolution are important, but the student has a limited budget.
decision_prompt: Which monitor is the best overall choice for this user?

show.summary: The visual explanation shows that price is still important because the user has a limited budget.

tell.main_text: The AI recommends UltraSharp 32 because it has the largest screen and highest resolution, but it may overvalue specifications and undervalue the limited budget.
steps: Screen size and resolution help coding productivity.
Budget is also important in this scenario.
A balanced option can be better than the most expensive option.

try.instructions: Adjust the screen size, resolution, and price weights to test how the simulated recommendation changes.
